name: FontProvider
summary: Provides the methods to obtain the list of the fonts

methods.name: GetCharsetList(nFontID)
methods.summary: Returns the list of available charsets for the given font
methods.remarks: Returns the list of available charsets for the given font

methods.name: GetCharsetList(fontName)
methods.summary: Returns the list of available charsets for the given font
methods.remarks: Returns the list of available charsets for the given font

methods.name: FontMMToTwips
methods.summary: Font size conversions. It is a font special factor (0.714) being applied in order to associate the mm unit with the real glyph size (like for vector fonts) without sub and superscripts space. So these function do not provide common standard point/twips/millimeter conversions!!! Converts mm to twips
methods.remarks: Font size conversions. It is a font special factor (0.714) being applied in order to associate the mm unit with the real glyph size (like for vector fonts) without sub and superscripts space. So these function do not provide common standard point/twips/millimeter conversions!!! Converts mm to twips

methods.name: GetFirstValidPredefinedFontID
methods.summary: Returns ID of the first existing predefined TTF font
methods.remarks: Returns ID of the first existing predefined TTF font

methods.name: GetFontID
methods.summary: Return ID for the given font Return the ID for the given font name. ID is the index to the table m_PreDefinedFontNameList. etval 0 Dialog Font ID etval 1-20 ID of the hardcoded Allplan's fonts ( see table m_PreDefinedFontNameList ) etval 21-63 ID of the hardcoded system's fonts ( see table m_PreDefinedFontNameList ) etval >=SYSTEM_FONT_ID (1000) ID of the system TTF font ( this ID is valid only during Allplan's session ) etval >=NON_EXISTING_FONT_ID(10000) ID of the font that isn't installed nor exists in the predefined table( this ID is valid only during Allplan's session ) etval INVALID_FONT_ID(N_FONT_INTERNAL_MIN_ID - 1) Invalid ID, font with given name doesn't exist
methods.remarks: Return ID for the given font Return the ID for the given font name. ID is the index to the table m_PreDefinedFontNameList. etval 0 Dialog Font ID etval 1-20 ID of the hardcoded Allplan's fonts ( see table m_PreDefinedFontNameList ) etval 21-63 ID of the hardcoded system's fonts ( see table m_PreDefinedFontNameList ) etval >=SYSTEM_FONT_ID (1000) ID of the system TTF font ( this ID is valid only during Allplan's session ) etval >=NON_EXISTING_FONT_ID(10000) ID of the font that isn't installed nor exists in the predefined table( this ID is valid only during Allplan's session ) etval INVALID_FONT_ID(N_FONT_INTERNAL_MIN_ID - 1) Invalid ID, font with given name doesn't exist

params.name: bCheckExistence
params.doc: When bCheckExistence is TRUE then the font with the particular ID has to be installed. In case, that this font is not installed, the function returns the empty string. When bCheckExistence is FALSE then the function returns the name of the font regardless of it is installed or not.

methods.name: GetFontName
methods.summary: Returns the name of the font Returns FontName corresponding to fontID If fontID is invalid then the empty string is returned
methods.remarks: Returns the name of the font Returns FontName corresponding to fontID If fontID is invalid then the empty string is returned

params.name: bCheckExistence
params.doc: When bCheckExistence is TRUE then the font with the particular ID has to be installed. In case, that this font is not installed, the function returns the empty string. When bCheckExistence is FALSE then the function returns the name of the font regardless of it is installed or not.

returns.doc: Returns FontName. If fontID is invalid then the empty string is returned.

methods.name: GetNemFontIDs
methods.summary: Returns the list of the IDs of all Allplan's fonts
methods.remarks: Returns the list of the IDs of all Allplan's fonts

methods.name: GetNemFonts
methods.summary: Returns the list of the names of all Allplan's fonts
methods.remarks: Returns the list of the names of all Allplan's fonts

methods.name: GetPredefinedFontIDs
methods.summary: Returns the list of then IDs of all installed and predefined TTF fonts
methods.remarks: Returns the list of then IDs of all installed and predefined TTF fonts

methods.name: GetPredefinedFonts
methods.summary: Returns the list of then names of all installed and predefined TTF fonts
methods.remarks: Returns the list of then names of all installed and predefined TTF fonts

methods.name: GetSystemFontIDs
methods.summary: Returns the list of the IDs of all installed TTF fonts
methods.remarks: Returns the list of the IDs of all installed TTF fonts

methods.name: GetSystemFonts
methods.summary: Returns the list of the names of all installed TTF fonts
methods.remarks: Returns the list of the names of all installed TTF fonts

returns.doc: The function returns TRUE when at least one font is installed

methods.name: GetTTFFontSubtype
methods.summary: Returns type of checked TTF font
methods.remarks: Returns type of checked TTF font

methods.name: Instance
methods.summary: Get the instance of the font provider
methods.remarks: Get the instance of the font provider

methods.name: NormalizeFontName
methods.summary: Removes from the fontname script suffix e.g. Arial CE -> Arial
methods.remarks: Removes from the fontname script suffix e.g. Arial CE -> Arial

methods.name: Refresh
methods.summary: Reinitialize the fonts It'd be called when some system's font was changed ( added/removed )
methods.remarks: Reinitialize the fonts It'd be called when some system's font was changed ( added/removed )
